reason: Phase-1 full-page retention crosses the 20-30% KV-pool threshold in 08.10 sustained traffic and reaches 112/128 pages under eviction pressure.
guardrails: Do not promote prefix cache by default before the 08.10 synthetic token mismatch is resolved.
Keep 08.20 scoped to independent SWA/component retention; do not add low-precision cache or graph allocator work.
Require component-level metrics and correctness tests for full/SWA/C4/C128/indexer/compress-state ownership.
